_comment: Conformance fixture 33 — production-wire profile attribution. Production get_experience joins users.name AS profile_name + users.slug AS profile_slug per harmonic-wave-api-platform user-tools.ts:60-63 (NOT creator_name/creator_slug). Step 12's completion card byline + What's Next CTA must resolve from these production fields. Without this fixture, the player passed unit tests via the demo-fixture-only `creator_name` alias but silently lost the byline + CTA on every real production response.
name: Profile Attribution (Production Wire) Conformance Fixture
